entries.title: To buy this Bay Area home, you’ll need Anthropic equity
entries.description: Someone’s offering an unusual deal for a 13-acre property in Mill Valley, just north of San Francisco.

entries.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
entries.description: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.

entries.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
entries.description: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.

entries.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
entries.description: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

entries.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
entries.description: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to en

entries.title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
entries.description: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these t

entries.title: Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy
entries.description: John Ternus, Apple's incoming CEO, is a hardware guy, signaling Apple may be putting devices back at the center of its strategy.

entries.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
entries.description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

entries.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
entries.description: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

entries.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
entries.description: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

entries.title: China blocks Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
entries.description: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.

entries.title: OpenAI could be making a phone with AI agents replacing apps
entries.description: There have been plenty of rumors about OpenAI's hardware plans, which involve launching a pair of earbuds. A new note from industry analyst Ming-Chi Kuo suggests that the AI company might be working o

entries.title: Meta inks deal for solar power at night, beamed from space
entries.description: Overview Energy's first contract with Meta is a small step toward a future of space-based solar power.

entries.title: Meta’s loss is Thinking Machines’ gain
entries.description: Meta has been poaching talent from Thinking Machines Lab. But it's a two-way street.

entries.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
entries.description: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

entries.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
entries.description: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

entries.title: Apple’s new CEO, and why Elon Musk wants to buy Cursor for $60B

entries.title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
entries.description: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

entries.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event

entries.title: Tim Cook is stepping down. What happens to Apple now?

news.title: To buy this Bay Area home, you’ll need Anthropic equity
news.description: Someone’s offering an unusual deal for a 13-acre property in Mill Valley, just north of San Francisco.

news.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
news.description: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.

news.title: Maine’s governor vetoes data center moratorium
news.description: L.D. 307 would have imposed the country’s first statewide moratorium on new data centers — lasting, in this case, until November 1, 2027.

news.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
news.description: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

news.title: Apple under Ternus: what comes next for the tech giant’s hardware strategy
news.description: John Ternus, Apple's incoming CEO, is a hardware guy, signaling Apple may be putting devices back at the center of its strategy.

news.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
news.description: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

news.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
news.description: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

news.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
news.description: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

news.title: China blocks Meta’s $2B Manus deal after months-long probe
news.description: China has ordered Meta to unwind its multibillion-dollar Manus acquisition, dealing a potential setback to Zuckerberg’s push into AI agents.

news.title: Meta inks deal for solar power at night, beamed from space

news.title: Meta’s loss is Thinking Machines’ gain
news.description: Meta has been poaching talent from Thinking Machines Lab. But it's a two-way street.

news.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
news.description: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

news.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
